fundamentals.long_business_summary: Modern Malleables Limited produces accessories and hardware for transmission lines, distribution lines, aerial optical fiber cables, aerial bunched cables, rail and telecom structures, and tower structures in India and internationally. It offers helical product, including armour grip suspension, armour rods, line guards, distribution tie, side tie, spool tie, distribution grips, guy grips, service grips, conductor splice, spiral vibration dampers, lashing rods, and t-connectors. The company also provides pole line hardware, such as machine bolts, insulator pins, eye nuts and eyelets, nuts and washers, guy clamps and hooks, turn buckle and extension links, plates and clevises, cross arms and braces, earth rods and clamps, oval and thimble eye bolts, and anchor rods. In addition, it offers insulator fitting, including tension clamps, suspension clamps, grading rings, arcing horns, yoke and sag plates, extension links, insulator fittings, hooks and shackles, and clevises and eyes. Further, the company provides compression fitting, such as compression deadend, compression joint, repair sleeves, parallel groove clamps, service connectors, compression connectors, and earthwire fittings. Furthermore, it offers spacers and dampers, including dampers, rigid spacers, flexible spacers, helical spacers, and spacer dampers, as well as OFC/OPGW accessories. Modern Malleables Limited was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Kolkata, India.
